MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Richard A. DeSantis, Esq., propria persona defendant.
*Defendant appeared. No other appearances. Ater hearing oral argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT RICHARD DESANTIS MOTION To Transfer Action is DENIED. - Agreement provides San Francisco as venue. Defendant has 30 days to Answer. CSR Beldon Yee, #2647 (302/REQ/RS)
